journal_entries.title: Cairo Arrival Stopover
journal_entries.body: Arrive Cairo Aug 3 (Aegean A3932, 06:55–08:50, ref ZZJQUU). Staying at Eileen Hotel near Tahrir Square/Nile Corniche. Sightseeing plan: Grand Egyptian Museum and Pyramids of Giza. Fly out Aug 4 at 22:40 on EgyptAir to Dar es Salaam (arrive 04:20+1). Late checkout Aug 5 not needed for sleep.
journal_entries.contacts: Eileen Hotel: +20 15 56434043, info@eileenhotel.com, 21 Youssef El-Gendy St, Abdeen, Downtown Cairo

journal_entries.title: Transit Day — Cairo → Dar → Arusha
journal_entries.body: EgyptAir CAI→DAR lands 04:20. Connect to Precision Air TC144 DAR→ARK, 10:50–12:00. Arrive Arusha midday. Stay: Serengeti Villa (+255 757 757 928), Aug 5-7.

journal_entries.title: Arusha Pre-Safari
journal_entries.body: Two nights at Serengeti Villa, Arusha. Prep for safari. Tanzania e-visa ($50/person) must be done online at visa.immigration.go.tz — visa-on-arrival no longer available. Zanzibar also requires separate mandatory travel insurance from ZIC.

journal_entries.title: Suricata Safaris — 3-Day Group Camping Safari
journal_entries.body: Safari with Suricata Safaris Ltd. Day 1: Tarangire National Park (Twiga Camp Site, FB). Day 2: Lake Manyara National Park (Twiga Camp Site, FB). Day 3: Ngorongoro Crater (overnight at Jevas Hotel, HB). Safari package: $1,200 total for 2 pax. $240 deposit (20%) paid. $960 balance due on arrival in cash (post-2009 USD notes) or online via Pesapal (+5% surcharge): payments.pesapal.com/suricatasafaris. Contact: Richard, +255 763 222 293, info@suricatasafaris.com.
journal_entries.location: Tarangire → Lake Manyara → Ngorongoro Crater, Tanzania

journal_entries.title: Ngorongoro Crater Day — One of the Best Days of the Trip
journal_entries.body: Driver guide: Emmanuel (not Richard) — excellent, pointed out wildlife before it was visible. Bought 2 beaded bracelets from a Maasai lady at the crater rim for Athina Mari — ~$20-25 USD / ~TZS 35,000, exact amount uncertain. Emmanuel mentioned an extra ranger tip at the gate: ~TZS 5,000 cash, separate from park fees — nobody told us beforehand. Described as one of the best days of the trip. Park fees for the day: entry permit $70.80/person, crater service fee $70.80/person, vehicle descent fee $295 (up to 2000kg). Ngorongoro nights are cold — warm layers needed.

journal_entries.title: Arusha Post-Safari — Kutoka Lodge
journal_entries.body: Two nights at Kutoka Lodge, Arusha. Rest after safari. Next: fly to Zanzibar Aug 11 (Precision Air TC145, 12:40–13:40). Precision Air has luggage restrictions favoring soft bags.

journal_entries.title: Zanzibar — Stone Town
journal_entries.body: Fly ARK→ZNZ Aug 11 (Precision Air TC145, 12:40–13:40). Stay: Treasures of Zanzibar House, 2 nights. Explore Stone Town.

journal_entries.title: Zanzibar — Beach (Kiwengwa)
journal_entries.body: Stay: Ayla Beach House, Kiwengwa, 4 nights. North coast (Nungwi area) offers more consistent swimming conditions vs. east/south where low tide limits access. Zanzibar local driving permit required (~$15, valid up to 3 months). Vasilis holds an IDP — most rental companies arrange the local permit with license photo 24+ hours before. Police checkpoints are frequent; carry both IDP and local permit (screenshot acceptable).

journal_entries.title: The Rock Restaurant Dinner
journal_entries.body: The Rock Restaurant, Zanzibar. Aug 15, 18:00–20:00 sitting. 2 adults. 2x Tropical Passion Fruit Cheesecake included. Fully paid ($46). Outdoor seating requested for sunset/star views. Contact: +255 776 591 360 / +255 763 070 658, booking@therockrestaurantzanzibar.com.

journal_entries.title: Dar es Salaam
journal_entries.body: Arrive by ferry from Zanzibar. Stay: Sunny Shore B&B, 2 nights. Interest in city exploration: Kivukoni Fish Market, Kariakoo Market, National Museum, Coco Beach, Bongoyo Island.

journal_entries.title: Cairo Departure Stopover
journal_entries.body: EgyptAir DAR→CAI, 05:20–11:05. Stay: Ramses Hilton, 1 night. Sightseeing: Islamic Cairo, the Citadel, Khan el-Khalili bazaar, Coptic Cairo. Taxi needed between Citadel and Coptic Cairo. Fly home Aug 20: Aegean A3935 CAI→ATH, 19:55–22:00, ref ZZL22S.

journal_entries.title: Trip Summary & Key Learnings
journal_entries.body: Full trip: Aug 3-20, 2026. Vasileios Kefallinos + Athina Mari. Cairo → Arusha → Tanzania safari circuit → Zanzibar → Dar es Salaam. Total flights: ~€2,707 (6 legs). Total lodging (excl. safari): ~$951. Safari: $1,200. Key tips: EgyptAir operates Cairo↔Dar — confirmed. Tanzania e-visa mandatory online ($50/person). Egypt e-visa multiple-entry ($65), printed copy mandatory. Ngorongoro nights are cold. Zanzibar: north coast best for swimming. Precision Air: soft bags preferred. August is peak safari season — ideal for Great Wildebeest Migration. Vasilis prefers simple, concise output (bullet lists over tables).

Children aged 5 years and below 16 years.

Olduvai Gorge / Shifting Sand / Laetoli Footprints.

Speed limits: 50kph in conservation area, 25kph at crater.
Off-road driving, wrong parking and other prohibited actions.

reminders.title: Ask Richard about the ranger tip (~TZS 5,000) before safari balance payment
reminders.detail: Emmanuel mentioned an extra ranger tip at the Ngorongoro gate: ~TZS 5,000 cash, separate from park fees. This was not disclosed beforehand. Confirm with Richard at Suricata Safaris (+255 763 222 293) whether this is expected and if it should be budgeted. Ask BEFORE paying the $960 safari balance on arrival.

reminders.title: Pay safari balance — $960 USD cash on arrival
reminders.detail: Suricata Safaris balance: $960 total ($1,200 less $240 deposit). Must be paid in cash with post-2009 USD notes. Alternative: online via Pesapal (+5% surcharge = $1,008): payments.pesapal.com/suricatasafaris.

reminders.title: Apply for Tanzania e-visa (2 travelers × $50)
reminders.detail: Mandatory online at visa.immigration.go.tz. Visa-on-arrival NO LONGER available as of January 2025. Apply well in advance. $100 total for both travelers.

reminders.title: Apply for Egypt e-visa, multiple-entry (2 travelers × $65)
reminders.detail: Apply separately per traveler at the Egypt e-visa portal. Multiple-entry required. Printed copy MANDATORY — print and carry. $130 total.

reminders.title: Get Zanzibar mandatory travel insurance from ZIC (2 travelers × $44)
reminders.detail: Zanzibar Insurance Corporation travel insurance is MANDATORY for Zanzibar entry. $88 total for both travelers. Arrange before departure.

reminders.title: Arrange Zanzibar local driving permit (~$15)
reminders.detail: Vasilis holds an IDP. A local Zanzibar Driving Permit is also required (~$15, valid up to 3 months). Most rental companies arrange with license photo provided 24+ hours before arrival. Police checkpoints are frequent — carry both IDP and local permit (screenshot acceptable).

reminders.title: Pack warm layers for Ngorongoro
reminders.detail: Ngorongoro nights are COLD. Bring warm layers — fleece, jacket, beanie. Evenings at Twiga Camp Site (Tarangire/Lake Manyara) also cool. Decathlon Forclaz trekking line recommended.

reminders.title: Pack DEET-based insect repellent
reminders.detail: Essential for Tanzania safari and Zanzibar. DEET-based repellent strongly recommended.

reminders.title: Use soft bags for Precision Air flights
reminders.detail: Precision Air TC144 (DAR→ARK) and TC145 (ARK→ZNZ) have luggage restrictions favoring soft bags. Avoid hard-shell suitcases for these legs.

reminders.title: Print Egypt e-visa copies
reminders.detail: Egypt e-visa requires a MANDATORY printed copy. Do not rely on digital only.

reminders.title: The Rock Restaurant dinner — Aug 15, 18:00-20:00
reminders.detail: Confirmed and fully paid ($46). 2 adults, 2x Tropical Passion Fruit Cheesecake. Outdoor seating for sunset/star views. Contact: +255 776 591 360 / +255 763 070 658.

reminders.title: Carry post-2009 USD notes for safari balance
reminders.detail: Suricata Safaris requires post-2009 ("new" design) USD notes. Older notes may be rejected. Prepare $960 in clean, new-design bills.
